assumptions: The adapter faithfully exposes the robust hypot realization.

implementation.runtime: Python interpreter and host math library
implementation.interfaceMechanism: JSON line with hexadecimal binary64 values
implementation.buildInstructions: No build step; use pinned Nix Python.
implementation.executionInstructions: Launch one fresh adapter process per case.

limitations: Evidence covers only twelve exact finite pairs.
No correct-rounding, alternate-mode, nonfinite, performance, or portability claim.
